svg.title: Equal aggregate learning can imply different firm boundaries
svg.desc: Two directed learning networks have the same total edge weight. When learning is diffuse across complementary clinic, laboratory, and payer links, the intermediary remains a platform. When the same learning weight is concentrated within types, the selected firm owns the two clinics.
